---

## Description

A clear, short description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. 
2. 
3. 

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened (error message, wrong output, crash, etc.).

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11)
- **Python version:** (e.g. 3.11.6 — run `python3 --version`)
- **CodeFox version:** (e.g. 0.3.2 — run `codefox --command version`)
- **Provider:** (e.g. gemini / ollama / openrouter)
- **Model:** (e.g. gemini-2.0-flash, llama3.2, from `.codefox.yml`)

## Config (optional)

If relevant, paste the **non-sensitive** parts of `.codefox.yml` (e.g. provider, model name, review settings). Do **not** paste `.codefoxenv` or any API keys.

```yaml
# paste here (without secrets)
```

## Logs / output (optional)

```
Paste full terminal output or error traceback here.
```

## Additional context

Any other details that might help (repo type, size of diff, first time vs recurring, etc.).
